name: Enterprise Event Planner Agent
description: Autonomous corporate event-planning agent. Discovers vendors across registry boundaries (NANDA Index, AgentFacts), negotiates on behalf of the enterprise, and seals bilaterally-signed records that cite both registry identities by digest. Described in the company's AI Catalog / ADS entry (ARD world); counterparties discovered via the NANDA Index world.

skills.name: Custom Cake Procurement
skills.description: Procures custom cakes for corporate events. Discovers vendors on the NANDA Index, negotiates price and terms, and seals a bilateral capsule cited by digest.

identity.note: Synthetic entry for NandaHack 2026 cross-registry demo
